site_tagline: CS0478 · CS9618 · IT9626 — Cambridge pseudocode reference interpreter
description: Free open-source Cambridge pseudocode interpreter and compiler (C11) for IGCSE Computer Science (0478 / CS0478), AS & A Level Computer Science (9618 / CS9618), and AS & A Level Information Technology (9626 / IT9626): run .pseudo offline, REPL, static check for CI, math/random/time builtins, pkg optional packages, VS Code workflow, and a full manual with tutorial.
keywords: Cambridge CS0478, Cambridge CS9618, IT9626, IGCSE Computer Science 0478, A Level Computer Science 9618, A Level Information Technology 9626, AS Level Computer Science, Cambridge 9618, Cambridge 0478, Cambridge 9626, CIEC pseudocode, pseudocode interpreter, pseudocode compiler, learn pseudocode, algorithm pseudocode, pseudocode REPL, computer science pseudocode, information technology pseudocode, Cambridge International, pseudocode tutorial, pseudocode examples, GitHub Pages pseudocode
author: Mahesh Ravariya
